arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Slot hails Nunez reaction after work-rate criticism
arts.sum: Arne Slot has hailed the reaction of Darwin Nunez following his criticism of the player’s effort during Liverpool’s draw at Aston Villa. Slot was critical of Nunez following his reaction to a missed chance during the clash at Villa Park earlier this month. The Uruguayan blazed over a glorious chance to win the game for […] The post Liverpool boss Slot hails Nunez reaction after work-rate criticism first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'For sure': Liverpool are definitely interested in signing £45m player who's already been spotted at Anfield - Romano
arts.sum: The 18-year-old confirmed he was at Anfield to watch Liverpool vs Ipswich in January 👀

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher explains why Liverpool haven’t finalised trio of contract renewals – Reveals who he ‘would love’ to coach Reds
arts.sum: Liverpool are yet to sign Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk or Trent Alexander-Arnold to new contracts as they don’t see the value of doing so for the next two to five years. That’s according to Jamie Carragher, who has discussed the situation with SportBILD today as it continues to rumble on. arts.ttl: What Arne Slot can and cannot do after being hit with touchline ban for Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot will be serving a touchline ban at Anfield against Newcastle United on Wednesday evening after the FA announced his punishment for being sent off vs Everton

arts.sum: Liverpool’s 2-0 win at Manchester City on Sunday was dominated by one man. Mohamed Salah scored and assisted for the 11th league game this season as the Reds moved 11 points clear of second-plac...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United dealing with formation change for crunch clash at Liverpool
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe says he will not read too much into Liverpool's surprising change of formation in their 2-0 win over Manchester City on Sunday. Howe, who is toying with the idea of playing a back five at Anfield, told Chronicle Live: "Every team has things that they tweak game to game.
